# §Constitution

## Canon

The operator's boot sequence — the generated reconstitution from the substrate's SETTLED laws.

## Narrative

The Constitution is the generated index of SETTLED requirements grouped by topic, rendered into CLAUDE.md as the operator's boot-time reconstitution. It is regenerated from the executable model (docstrings + graph) by gen_spec.py, so the operator re-boots from substrate, not from stale prose.

## Why

WHY a generated constitution (R-operator-prompt-from-substrate): the operator's prompt must be a projection of the substrate's SETTLED laws, never hand-maintained prose that drifts from the graph. Regenerating it from the executable model makes drift structurally impossible — the constitution IS the substrate, rendered.
